overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an Avatar-style game showing a Na'vi character riding a large winged ikran (banshee) through an alien jungle landscape. The camera follows steadily behind as they soar between floating mountains and dense green canyons under a bright blue sky with a massive gas giant planet visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial canyon flight between floating mountains

events.description: character raises spear weapon high while riding, holding it aloft

agents.ego_description: riding the ikran mount through the aerial canyons, maintaining balance while surveying the landscape below, raising weapon at midpoint

entered.detail: tall rocky spires and floating islands covered in vegetation rising from the mist
large pale blue planet with visible rings or atmospheric bands dominating the sky
dense bioluminescent green forest covering the canyon floors and cliff faces
large leathery wings of the flying creature with orange and black patterning flapping steadily
low-lying clouds and mist filling the deep valleys between rock formations

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous aerial flight through an alien canyon system. The ikran's wings beat steadily as it navigates between massive floating mountains and dense jungle canopy far below. The character raises their spear weapon midway through, silhouetted against the bright sky dominated by a massive gas giant planet. Mist clouds drift through the valleys, and the floating mountains gradually shift from center to right as the creature banks slightly during flight.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey through a lush alien canyon system that shifts from a centered flight path to a sweeping bank. It begins with the steady beat of the ikran's wings as the camera glides between massive floating mountains and a dense jungle canopy far below. As the creature navigates through drifting mist clouds in the valleys, the character raises a spear, appearing as a silhouette against a bright sky dominated by a massive gas giant planet. The scene then shifts as the ikran banks slightly, causing the floating mountains to migrate from the center toward the right of the frame before the flight continues deeper into the canyon.
